content: Autonomous agents can leverage Transformer attention gating for episodic memory, tuned via intrinsic curiosity module (ICM) reward, to dynamically expand or contract working memory capacity only for high-uncertainty, task-relevant past experiences, resolving the core tradeoff between limited working memory throughput and unconstrained episodic recall.
source_topics: Transformer attention mechanism for episodic memory
trigger_topic: Transformer attention mechanism for episodic memory
